# mihari_heartbeat (Resource)

Manages a Mihari heartbeat monitor.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "mihari_heartbeat" "nightly_backup" {
  name         = "Nightly Backup Job"
  period       = 1440
  grace_period = 30
  is_active    = true
  policy_id    = mihari_policy.critical.id
}

resource "mihari_heartbeat" "cron_sync" {
  name         = "Data Sync Cron"
  period       = 60
  grace_period = 10
  is_active    = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `grace_period` (Number) Grace period in minutes before alerting.
- `name` (String) Name of the heartbeat.
- `period` (Number) Expected period between pings in minutes.

### Optional

- `is_active` (Boolean) Whether the heartbeat is active.
- `policy_id` (String) UUID of the alert policy to attach.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Creation timestamp.
- `id` (String) UUID of the heartbeat.
- `last_ping_at` (String) Timestamp of the last ping.
- `status` (String) Current heartbeat status.
- `updated_at` (String) Last update timestamp.
